session.tool_result: 1→"""Draft PR implementation of plan storage. 2→ 3→Uses GitHub draft pull requests as the backing store for plans. 4→PR body contains the plan-header metadata block followed by plan content. 5→The "erk-plan" label identifies plan PRs vs regular draft PRs. 6→""" 7→ 8→from collections.abc import Mapping 9→from datetime import UTC 10→from pathlib import Path 11→ 12→from erk_shared.gateway.github.abc import GitHub 13→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import ( 15→ add_metadata_block, 16→ find_metadata_block, 17→ has_metadata_block, 18→ render_metadata_block, 19→ replace_metadata_block_in_body, 20→) 21→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.plan_header import ( 22→ format_plan_header_body, 23→) 24→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import ( 25→ CREATED_FROM_SESSION, 26→ CREATED_FROM_WORKFLOW_RUN_URL, 27→ LEARNED_FROM_ISSUE, 28→ OBJECTIVE_ISSUE, 29→ SOURCE_REPO, 30→ PlanHeaderSchema,

1→"""Shared conversion helpers for Plan construction from provider-specific types. 2→ 3→Provides single-parse conversions that populate header_fields on Plan, 4→eliminating repeated YAML parsing of the plan-header metadata block. 5→Also provides typed accessor helpers for reading fields from header_fields. 6→""" 7→ 8→from datetime import datetime 9→ 10→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.types import IssueInfo 11→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import find_metadata_block 12→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import OBJECTIVE_ISSUE 13→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRDetails 14→from erk_shared.plan_store.types import Plan, PlanState 15→ 16→ 17→def github_issue_to_plan(issue: IssueInfo) -> Plan: 18→ """Convert a GitHub Issue (e.g. objective) to Plan with pre-parsed header fields. 19→ 20→ Parses the plan-header metadata block once and stores the result 21→ in header_fields, avoiding repeated YAML parsing by callers. 22→ 23→ Used for GitHub Issues that carry plan-header metadata, such as 24→ objective issues. Not used for draft-PR-backed plans. 25→ 26→ Args: 27→ issue: IssueInfo from GraphQL query 28→ 29→ Returns: 30→ Plan with header_fields populated from plan-header block

1→"""Extraction of implementation and learn events from GitHub issue comments. 2→ 3→This module provides functions to extract session IDs from comments that 4→contain erk metadata blocks for implementation and learn events. 5→""" 6→ 7→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import extract_metadata_value 8→ 9→ 10→def extract_implementation_sessions(comments: list[str]) -> list[str]: 11→ """Extract session IDs from implementation event comments. 12→ 13→ Looks for erk:metadata-block:impl-started and erk:metadata-block:impl-ended 14→ comments and extracts session_id from the YAML content. 15→ 16→ Args: 17→ comments: List of comment bodies from a plan issue 18→ 19→ Returns: 20→ List of unique session IDs in order of first occurrence 21→ """ 22→ session_ids: list[str] = [] 23→ seen: set[str] = set() 24→ 25→ for comment in comments: 26→ # Check both impl-started and impl-ended blocks 27→ for block_key in ("impl-started", "impl-ended"): 28→ session_id = extract_metadata_value(comment, block_key, "session_id") 29→ if session_id is not None and session_id not in seen: 30→ session_ids.append(session_id)

1→"""Implementation folder utilities for erk and erk-kits. 2→ 3→This module provides shared utilities for managing branch-scoped impl directories 4→under .erk/impl-context/<branch>/: 5→- plan.md: Immutable implementation plan 6→- plan-ref.json: Provider-agnostic plan reference 7→ 8→These utilities are used by both erk (for local operations) and erk-kits 9→(for kit CLI commands). 10→""" 11→ 12→from __future__ import annotations 13→ 14→import json 15→import shutil 16→from dataclasses import dataclass 17→from datetime import UTC, datetime 18→from pathlib import Path 19→from typing import Literal 20→ 21→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import ( 22→ create_worktree_creation_block, 23→ render_erk_issue_event, 24→) 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import CREATED_BY, LAST_DISPATCHED_RUN_ID 26→ 27→IMPL_DIR_RELATIVE = ".erk/impl-context" 28→"""Relative path for branch-scoped implementation directories.""" 29→ 30→_REQUIRED_REF_FIELDS = ("provider", "plan_id", "url", "created_at", "synced_at")

session.tool_result: 1→"""Linear pipeline for PR submission. 2→ 3→Replaces the dual-path branching orchestration with a sequence of plain 4→functions transforming a frozen SubmitState dataclass. 5→ 6→Each step: (ErkContext, SubmitState) -> SubmitState | SubmitError 7→""" 8→ 9→import dataclasses 10→import sys 11→import uuid 12→from collections.abc import Callable 13→from dataclasses import dataclass 14→from functools import cache 15→from pathlib import Path 16→ 17→import click 18→ 19→from erk.cli.commands.pr.shared import ( 20→ assemble_pr_body, 21→ echo_plan_context_status, 22→ maybe_advance_lifecycle_to_impl, 23→ recover_plan_header, 24→ run_commit_message_generation, 25→) 26→from erk.cli.constants import PLANNED_PR_TITLE_PREFIX 27→from erk.cli.ensure import UserFacingCliError 28→from erk.core.commit_message_generator import CommitMessageGenerator 29→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 30→from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext, PlanContextProvider

1→"""Shared utilities for PR commands. 2→ 3→This module contains common functionality used by multiple PR commands 4→(rewrite, submit) to avoid code duplication. 5→""" 6→ 7→from __future__ import annotations 8→ 9→from dataclasses import dataclass 10→from pathlib import Path 11→ 12→import click 13→ 14→from erk.core.commit_message_generator import ( 15→ CommitMessageGenerator, 16→ CommitMessageRequest, 17→ CommitMessageResult, 18→) 19→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 20→from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext 21→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import find_metadata_block, render_metadata_block 22→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import ( 23→ CREATED_AT, 24→ CREATED_BY, 25→ LIFECYCLE_STAGE, 26→ SCHEMA_VERSION, 27→) 28→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.types import MetadataBlock 29→from erk_shared.gateway.github.pr_footer import build_pr_body_footer 30→from erk_shared.gateway.gt.events import CompletionEvent, ProgressEvent

1→"""Command to validate PR rules or plan format for the current branch.""" 2→ 3→from dataclasses import dataclass 4→from pathlib import Path 5→from typing import NamedTuple 6→ 7→import click 8→ 9→from erk.cli.ensure import Ensure 10→from erk.cli.github_parsing import parse_issue_identifier 11→from erk.core.context import ErkContext 12→from erk_shared.context.types import NoRepoSentinel 13→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.types import IssueNotFound 15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import find_metadata_block 16→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.plan_header import extract_plan_from_comment 17→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.schemas import PlanHeaderSchema 18→from erk_shared.gateway.github.pr_footer import ( 19→ extract_header_from_body, 20→ is_header_at_legacy_position, 21→) 22→from erk_shared.gateway.github.types import PRNotFound 23→from erk_shared.gateway.pr.submit import has_checkout_footer_for_pr 24→from erk_shared.impl_folder import read_plan_ref, resolve_impl_dir 25→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output 26→from erk_shared.plan_store.planned_pr_lifecycle import ( 27→ extract_plan_content, 28→ has_original_plan_section, 29→) 30→

1→"""Validate an objective's format and roadmap consistency.""" 2→ 3→import json 4→from dataclasses import dataclass 5→from pathlib import Path 6→ 7→import click 8→ 9→from erk.cli.alias import alias 10→from erk.cli.core import discover_repo_context 11→from erk.cli.github_parsing import parse_issue_identifier 12→from erk.core.context import ErkContext, RepoContext 13→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.abc import GitHubIssues 14→from erk_shared.gateway.github.issues.types import IssueNotFound 15→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import ( 16→ find_metadata_block, 17→) 18→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.dependency_graph import ( 19→ DependencyGraph, 20→ build_graph, 21→ compute_graph_summary, 22→ find_graph_next_node, 23→ phases_from_graph, 24→) 25→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.roadmap import ( 26→ parse_roadmap, 27→ serialize_phases, 28→) 29→from erk_shared.output.output import user_output 30→

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3 2→"""Update PR body with AI-generated summary and footer. 3→ 4→This command generates a PR summary from the diff using Claude, then updates 5→the PR body with the summary, optional workflow link, and standardized footer. 6→ 7→This combines PR summary generation + footer construction + gh pr edit in one step, 8→replacing ~30 lines of bash in GitHub Actions workflows. 9→ 10→Usage: 11→ erk exec ci-update-pr-body \\ 12→ --plan-id 123 \\ 13→ [--run-id 456789] \\ 14→ [--run-url https://github.com/owner/repo/actions/runs/456789] 15→ 16→Output: 17→ JSON object with success status 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success (PR body updated) 21→ 1: Error (no PR for branch, empty diff, Claude failure, or GitHub API failed) 22→ 23→Examples: 24→ $ erk exec ci-update-pr-body --plan-id 123 25→ { 26→ "success": true, 27→ "pr_number": 789 28→ } 29→ 30→ $ erk exec ci-update-pr-body \\

1→"""Fetch erk-plans linked to an objective. 2→ 3→Usage: 4→ erk exec get-plans-for-objective <OBJECTIVE_NUMBER> 5→ 6→Output: 7→ JSON with {success, objective_number, plans: [{number, state, title}]} 8→ 9→Exit Codes: 10→ 0: Success - plans fetched 11→ 1: Error - API error 12→""" 13→ 14→import json 15→ 16→import click 17→ 18→from erk_shared.context.helpers import ( 19→ require_issues as require_github_issues, 20→) 21→from erk_shared.context.helpers import ( 22→ require_repo_root, 23→) 24→from erk_shared.gateway.github.metadata.core import find_metadata_block 25→ 26→ 27→@click.command(name="get-plans-for-objective") 28→@click.argument("objective_number", type=int) 29→@click.pass_context 30→def get_plans_for_objective(ctx: click.Context, objective_number: int) -> None:

1→"""Set up .erk/impl-context/ folder from GitHub PR in current worktree. 2→ 3→This exec command fetches a plan from a GitHub PR, creates a feature branch, 4→checks it out, and creates the .erk/impl-context/ folder structure for implementation. 5→ 6→Usage: 7→ erk exec setup-impl-from-pr <plan-number> [--session-id <id>] 8→ 9→Output: 10→ Structured JSON output with success status and folder details 11→ 12→Exit Codes: 13→ 0: Success (.erk/impl-context/ folder created, branch checked out) 14→ 1: Error (PR not found, plan fetch failed, git operations failed) 15→ 16→Examples: 17→ $ erk exec setup-impl-from-pr 1028 18→ {"success": true, "impl_path": "/path/to/.erk/impl-context", 19→ "plan_number": 1028, "branch": "P1028-..."} 20→""" 21→ 22→import json 23→from pathlib import Path 24→ 25→import click 26→ 27→from erk_shared.context.helpers import ( 28→ require_branch_manager, 29→ require_cwd, 30→ require_git,
session.assistant: Now let me find the import lines and add the registry import for each file, then replace strings. I'll do them all in parallel.
